What is the current Price Target and Forecast for Chevron (CVX)

summary: TD Cowen lowered price target from $214 to $204 on April 16, 2026, maintaining Hold rating. Scotiabank upgraded to Hold (from Sell) on March 27 and raised PT from $168 to $187 on April 22. Overall consensus (42 analysts): 17 Buy, 7 Hold, 2 Sell. Median price target $209.
